tasks.intent:
WHAT TO CLICK:
- Look for filter controls in the left sidebar or horizontal filter bar near the top
- Click on text that says 'Private Seller' or 'By Owner' in a dropdown or checkbox area
- Type '33101' in the location/zip code input field (rectangular text box)
- Click radius dropdown and select '25 miles'
- Type '35000' in minimum price field
- Click sort dropdown and select 'Recently Updated' or 'Newest First'

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Condition pills showing 'All', 'New', 'Used' - these change the URL and lose filters
- Large boat photos or image galleries
- Social media icons (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter squares)
- Navigation dropdown menus in header
- Dealer logos or brand banners

STEPS:
1. Do NOT call done() in your first step - you must apply filters first
2. Look for 'Private Seller' or 'By Owner' filter option and click it
3. Find location field and type_text('33101')
4. Set radius to 25 miles in dropdown
5. Type_text('35000') in minimum price field
6. Select 'Recently Updated' from sort dropdown
7. VERIFICATION REQUIRED: Read the result count displayed on page - it should show LESS than 5,000 boats
8. Check page title or heading for 'by owner' or 'private' text
9. If result count still shows 125,000+ boats, filters failed - re-apply Private Seller filter first
10. Only call done(success=true) after verification confirms filters worked

ERROR HANDLERS:
- Cookie popup: click Accept button once, max 2 steps
- Page load error: key_press(keys='f5') to refresh
- If filters reset: start over with Private Seller filter (most important)
- Navigation away from site: key_press(keys='alt+left')

FILTER PRIORITY ORDER (most important first):
1. Private Seller/By Owner (critical - this is our target audience)
2. Location 33101 with 25 mile radius
3. Minimum price $35,000
4. Sort by Recently Updated

Do NOT call done() until you have actually clicked filter controls AND verified the result count decreased.

WHAT TO CLICK:
- Click on the boat listing TITLE TEXT showing 'Year Make Model' - this is blue text BELOW each photo
- NEVER click the large boat photo itself - it opens a fullscreen gallery trap
- Click the Back button or use Alt+Left to return to search results
- Click 'Next' pagination link at bottom of page to continue

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Large boat photos or image thumbnails (opens '1 of N' gallery)
- 'Contact Seller' or 'Request Info' buttons (popup forms)
- Social media icons (small colored squares)
- Heart/favorite icons on listing cards
- Dealer website links or logos

STEPS FOR EACH LISTING:
1. Click on the blue title text showing boat details (NOT the photo)
2. IMMEDIATELY read the URL from browser address bar at top - looks like boattrader.com/boats/details/boat-name-12345/
3. scroll(direction='down', amount=5) aggressively past photo gallery
4. Continue scrolling down to Description or Seller Notes section
5. Look for phone numbers: (305)555-1234, 786-555-1234, 305.555.5678 format
6. NOT phone numbers: prices ($45,000), years (2020), zip codes (33101), model numbers
7. Extract Year, Make, Model from title or specs
8. Extract Price from listing (usually prominent near title)
9. Extract Seller Name if visible
10. key_press(keys='alt+left') to go back to results
11. Repeat for next listing
12. When page complete, click 'Next' pagination link

OUTPUT FORMAT for done():
'Year: 2018, Make: Sea Ray, Model: Sundancer 320, Price: $89,000, URL: https://boattrader.com/boats/details/sea-ray-sundancer-320-12345/, Phone: 305-555-1234, Seller: John Smith'

If no phone found: 'Phone: none'
Do NOT output template text like 'Year: <from title>' - use actual values like 'Year: 2018'

ERROR HANDLERS:
- 404 page: key_press(keys='alt+left'), done(summary='SKIPPED | 404')
- Photo gallery trap (shows '1 of N'): key_press(keys='Escape'), key_press(keys='alt+left')
- Off-site navigation: key_press(keys='alt+left') immediately
- No more listings: done(summary='PAGE_COMPLETE')

CRITICAL PHONE EXTRACTION:
- Phone numbers are HIGHEST VALUE - enable direct seller contact
- Phones are buried deep: scroll 5-6 times past photos to Description/Seller Notes
- Do NOT click Contact buttons - they hide phones behind forms
- If listing shows only 'Contact Seller', phone is hidden - still extract other data
- Always report phone field: 'Phone: 305-555-1234' or 'Phone: none'

URL EXTRACTION:
- MANDATORY: Read URL from browser address bar BEFORE scrolling
- URL looks like: boattrader.com/boats/details/boat-name-numbers/
- Include full URL in output format

loop.pagination_intent: Click the 'Next' pagination link at the bottom of the search results page to load more listings
